raw_title: “I Empathize With Them”: How Newsroom Leadership Assesses Mental Health and Hostility Toward Their Journalists
title_en: “I Empathize With Them”: How Newsroom Leadership Assesses Mental Health and Hostility Toward Their Journalists
title_zh: “我同情他们”：新闻编辑室领导如何评估其记者的心理健康和敌意
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻编辑室领导如何评估记者面临的心理健康问题和敌意环境。它关注领导层对记者工作压力的看法和应对方式。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how newsroom leaders assess mental health issues and hostile environments faced by journalists. It focuses on leadership perspectives and responses to workplace stress.
research_direction_zh: 新闻业职业健康与领导力研究，关注媒体组织中的心理健康支持和敌意管理。
research_direction_en: Research on occupational health and leadership in journalism, focusing on mental health support and hostility management in media organizations.
